acquisition method: Data-dependent acquisition was used to select the top 10 precursor ions for fragmentation
cleavage agent: Samples were digested by sequencing grade trypsin
collision energy: fragmentation by higher-energy collisional dissociation with normalized collision energy between 28.0 and 31.0
enrichment method: phosphopeptide binding/wash buffer from the High-Select TiO2 phosphopeptide enrichment kit
instrument: eluted into an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Ionization of eluted peptides was performed by electrospray ionization
labeling: labeled using a TMT10plex isobaric label reagent set
